mapper.select: SELECT d.*, COALESCE((SELECT MAX(v.ver_num) FROM wf_flow_version v WHERE v.flow_id = d.id AND v.status != 'draft'), (SELECT MAX(v.ver_num) FROM wf_flow_version v WHERE v.flow_id = d.id)) AS current_ver, EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM wf_flow_version v WHERE v.flow_id = d.id AND v.status = 'active') AS has_published_version FROM wf_flow_definition d WHERE d.id = #{id} AND d.is_deleted = 0

SELECT d.*, COALESCE((SELECT MAX(v.ver_num) FROM wf_flow_version v WHERE v.flow_id = d.id AND v.status != 'draft'), (SELECT MAX(v.ver_num) FROM wf_flow_version v WHERE v.flow_id = d.id)) AS current_ver, EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM wf_flow_version v WHERE v.flow_id = d.id AND v.status = 'active') AS has_published_version FROM wf_flow_definition d WHERE d.id = #{id} AND d.is_deleted = 0 FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wf_flow_definition (name, flow_key, category, description, remark, status, created_by, updated_by, is_deleted, crte_time, updt_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{flowKey}, #{category}, #{description}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0, #{crteTime}, #{updtTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE wf_flow_definition SET is_deleted = 1, updt_time = #{updtTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE wf_flow_definition SET status = 'disabled', updt_time = #{updtTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wf_flow_version WHERE flow_id = #{flowId} ORDER BY ver_num DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM wf_flow_version WHERE flow_id = #{flowId} AND status = 'draft' ORDER BY ver_num DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wf_flow_version (flow_id, flow_key, ver_num, status, publish_note, canvas_nodes, canvas_edges, canvas_pan_x, canvas_pan_y, canvas_zoom, published_by, published_time, created_by, crte_time, updt_time) VALUES (#{flowId}, #{flowKey}, #{verNum}, #{status}, #{publishNote}, #{canvasNodes}, #{canvasEdges}, #{canvasPanX}, #{canvasPanY}, #{canvasZoom}, #{publishedBy}, #{publishedTime}, #{createdBy}, #{crteTime}, #{updtTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE wf_flow_version SET status = #{status}, updt_time = #{updtTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wf_flow_node (version_id, flow_id, node_id, node_type, label, shape, pos_x, pos_y, sub_label, sort_order, crte_time, updt_time) VALUES (#{versionId}, #{flowId}, #{nodeId}, #{nodeType}, #{label}, #{shape}, #{posX}, #{posY}, #{subLabel}, #{sortOrder}, #{crteTime}, #{updtTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM wf_node_approval_config WHERE node_id IN (SELECT id FROM wf_flow_node WHERE version_id = #{versionId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wf_node_approval_config (node_id, approval_strategy, approval_persons, approval_remark, crte_time, updt_time) VALUES (#{nodeId}, #{approvalStrategy}, #{approvalPersons}, #{approvalRemark}, #{crteTime}, #{updtTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM wf_node_auto_config WHERE node_id IN (SELECT id FROM wf_flow_node WHERE version_id = #{versionId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wf_node_auto_config (node_id, task_seq, task_code, auto_remark, crte_time, updt_time) VALUES (#{nodeId}, #{taskSeq}, #{taskCode}, #{autoRemark}, #{crteTime}, #{updtTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM wf_node_notify_config WHERE node_id IN (SELECT id FROM wf_flow_node WHERE version_id = #{versionId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wf_node_notify_config (node_id, notify_channels, notify_target, notify_persons, notify_tpl, notify_remark, crte_time, updt_time) VALUES (#{nodeId}, #{notifyChannels}, #{notifyTarget}, #{notifyPersons}, #{notifyTpl}, #{notifyRemark}, #{crteTime}, #{updtTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM wf_node_condition_config WHERE node_id IN (SELECT id FROM wf_flow_node WHERE version_id = #{versionId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wf_node_condition_config (node_id, condition_remark, crte_time, updt_time) VALUES (#{nodeId}, #{conditionRemark}, #{crteTime}, #{updtTime})

INSERT INTO wf_flow_edge (version_id, flow_id, edge_id, from_node_id, to_node_id, label, cond_logic, remark, crte_time, updt_time) VALUES (#{versionId}, #{flowId}, #{edgeId}, #{fromNodeId}, #{toNodeId}, #{label}, #{condLogic}, #{remark}, #{crteTime}, #{updtTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM wf_edge_cond_rule WHERE edge_id IN (SELECT id FROM wf_flow_edge WHERE version_id = #{versionId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wf_edge_cond_rule (edge_id, seq, field_code, operator, field_val, crte_time, updt_time) VALUES (#{edgeId}, #{seq}, #{fieldCode}, #{operator}, #{fieldVal}, #{crteTime}, #{updtTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wf_role_dict WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wf_flow_definition_evt (id, name, flow_key, category, description, remark, status, created_by, updated_by, is_deleted, crte_time, updt_time, opter_id, opt_time, oprt_type) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{flowKey}, #{category}, #{description}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, #{isDeleted}, #{crteTime}, #{updtTime}, #{opterId}, #{optTime}, #{oprtType})

INSERT INTO wf_flow_version_evt (id, flow_id, flow_key, ver_num, status, publish_note, canvas_nodes, canvas_edges, canvas_pan_x, canvas_pan_y, canvas_zoom, published_by, published_time, created_by, crte_time, updt_time, opter_id, opt_time, oprt_type) VALUES (#{id}, #{flowId}, #{flowKey}, #{verNum}, #{status}, #{publishNote}, #{canvasNodes}, #{canvasEdges}, #{canvasPanX}, #{canvasPanY}, #{canvasZoom}, #{publishedBy}, #{publishedTime}, #{createdBy}, #{crteTime}, #{updtTime}, #{opterId}, #{optTime}, #{oprtType})

INSERT INTO wf_flow_node_evt (id, version_id, flow_id, node_id, node_type, label, shape, pos_x, pos_y, sub_label, sort_order, crte_time, updt_time, opter_id, opt_time, oprt_type) VALUES (#{id}, #{versionId}, #{flowId}, #{nodeId}, #{nodeType}, #{label}, #{shape}, #{posX}, #{posY}, #{subLabel}, #{sortOrder}, #{crteTime}, #{updtTime}, #{opterId}, #{optTime}, #{oprtType})

INSERT INTO wf_node_approval_config_evt (id, node_id, approval_strategy, approval_persons, approval_remark, crte_time, updt_time, opter_id, opt_time, oprt_type) VALUES (#{id}, #{nodeId}, #{approvalStrategy}, #{approvalPersons}, #{approvalRemark}, #{crteTime}, #{updtTime}, #{opterId}, #{optTime}, #{oprtType})

INSERT INTO wf_node_auto_config_evt (id, node_id, task_seq, task_code, auto_remark, crte_time, updt_time, opter_id, opt_time, oprt_type) VALUES (#{id}, #{nodeId}, #{taskSeq}, #{taskCode}, #{autoRemark}, #{crteTime}, #{updtTime}, #{opterId}, #{optTime}, #{oprtType})

INSERT INTO wf_node_notify_config_evt (id, node_id, notify_channels, notify_target, notify_persons, notify_tpl, notify_remark, crte_time, updt_time, opter_id, opt_time, oprt_type) VALUES (#{id}, #{nodeId}, #{notifyChannels}, #{notifyTarget}, #{notifyPersons}, #{notifyTpl}, #{notifyRemark}, #{crteTime}, #{updtTime}, #{opterId}, #{optTime}, #{oprtType})

INSERT INTO wf_node_condition_config_evt (id, node_id, condition_remark, crte_time, updt_time, opter_id, opt_time, oprt_type) VALUES (#{id}, #{nodeId}, #{conditionRemark}, #{crteTime}, #{updtTime}, #{opterId}, #{optTime}, #{oprtType})

INSERT INTO wf_flow_edge_evt (id, version_id, flow_id, edge_id, from_node_id, to_node_id, label, cond_logic, remark, crte_time, updt_time, opter_id, opt_time, oprt_type) VALUES (#{id}, #{versionId}, #{flowId}, #{edgeId}, #{fromNodeId}, #{toNodeId}, #{label}, #{condLogic}, #{remark}, #{crteTime}, #{updtTime}, #{opterId}, #{optTime}, #{oprtType})

INSERT INTO wf_edge_cond_rule_evt (id, edge_id, seq, field_code, operator, field_val, crte_time, updt_time, opter_id, opt_time, oprt_type) VALUES (#{id}, #{edgeId}, #{seq}, #{fieldCode}, #{operator}, #{fieldVal}, #{crteTime}, #{updtTime}, #{opterId}, #{optTime}, #{oprtType})

INSERT INTO wf_role_dict_evt (id, role_code, role_name, sort_order, is_active, crte_time, updt_time, opter_id, opt_time, oprt_type) VALUES (#{id}, #{roleCode}, #{roleName}, #{sortOrder}, #{isActive}, #{crteTime}, #{updtTime}, #{opterId}, #{optTime}, #{oprtType})
